system.notes:
Abilities

  • Lucky Escape: The executive can spend an Edge to end the Grabbed or Immobilized status.
  • Stay Alive: The executive can spend an Edge to double their Defense Score against one attack.
  • Blaster IC: On a failed Hacking attempt against the executive, intruder suffers 12S Biofeedback damage.

Traits

  • Vision Enhancements: Flare Compensation, Low-
  • Light, Thermographic:
  • Mash the Trigger: The executive does not suffer
  • recoil penalties.:
  • Hardy: The executive has Leverage on toxin, disease,
  • and dying resistance tests.:
